scripts.dev: concurrently "npm -w menu-service run dev" "npm -w customer-service run dev" "npm -w order-service run dev" "npm -w web run dev"
scripts.prisma:migrate: npm -w menu-service run prisma:migrate && npm -w customer-service run prisma:migrate && npm -w order-service run prisma:migrate
scripts.prisma:seed: npm -w menu-service run prisma:seed && npm -w customer-service run prisma:seed
